title: Marathon Digital Holdings Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: Marathon Digital Holdings reported Q1 2023 results. The company grew its energized hash rate 64% from 7.0 exahashes to 11.5 exahashes. Marathon increased its cash position by $12 million, reduced debt by $50 million, and increased unrestricted bitcoin holdings by 3,132 bitcoin. The company exited the quarter with approximately $124.9 million in unrestricted cash and 11,466 bitcoin with market value of approximately $326.5 million on March 31. Adjusted EBITDA was $18.6 million in Q1 compared with $9.8 million in the prior year period demonstrating improving financial performance.
